text: Crickets is an absolutely wonderful dog sitter. She focuses on making sure she meets your dog where she is and provides all the best care. My pup, a 1 year and 9 month old great pyranees, loved her. He is shy with people but he opened up to her right away. She made sure he was walked and had enough interaction as he needed and showed no signs of distress. She provided regular updates and ensured to ask questions if there were any doubts. I did the dog sitting service and she took care of myself home and even looked after my cat. My cat is a picky girl, and cricket gave her the space she needed and made sure she had all she needed. Can't recommend Can I Pet that Dawg enough!

I couldn’t have asked for a better pet sitter. Bree was reliable, communicative, and clearly cared for my dog (Bandit) like he was her own. I got regular updates and photos, which gave me total peace of mind while I was away. My dog was so happy, relaxed, and well cared for when I got home. Highly recommend to anyone looking for someone trustworthy, attentive, and genuinely great with animals!
